category_sources: Official LangGraph docs provide a LangGraph CLI page.
source_facts.description describes LangGraph CLI as a command-line interface for deploying apps to the LangGraph platform.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is langgraph-cli and official docs use LangGraph CLI as the page title.
docs_sources: Official LangChain documentation has a dedicated LangGraph CLI page.
Official LangChain reference has a langgraph-cli API reference.
repo_sources: Official LangChain/GitHub source results identify langgraph-cli as part of the langchain-ai/langgraph repository.
tags_sources: Official docs describe LangGraph CLI commands and configuration.
source_facts.description identifies deployment to the LangGraph platform.
